subject: Fermi GBM trigger 150305751 is not a GRB
submitter: Eric Burns at U of Alabama  <eb0016@uah.edu>
body:
E. Burns (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 447271330/150305751
at 18:02:07.48 UT on the 5th of March 2015, tentatively classified
as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to a
solar flare."
